query: Slackware ispell.words dictionary size number of words
citation_excerpt: If you have the Slackware Linux distribution, you have the file `/usr/lib/ispell/ispell.words`, which is a sorted, 38,400 word dictionary.

query: CSS grid find fr size flex factor sum less than threshold
expected_answer: If the flex factor sum is less than 1, set it to 1
citation_excerpt: Let flex factor sum be the sum of the flex factors of the flexible tracks. If this value is less than 1, set it to 1 instead.

query: CSS page property applies to which boxes
expected_answer: boxes that create class A break points
citation_excerpt: page auto | <<custom-ident> auto boxes that create class A break points no (but see prose)

query: FileAPI FileReaderSync Exposed worker types
citation_excerpt:
[Exposed=(DedicatedWorker,SharedWorker)]
interface FileReaderSync {

query: GFDL Back-Cover Text maximum length words
citation_excerpt: A Front-Cover Text may be at most 5 words, and a Back-Cover Text may be at most 25 words.

query: HTML5 img sizes attribute source-size-value allowed CSS functions
citation_excerpt: Any CSS function other than the `calc()` function is invalid.

query: GNU FDL Back-Cover Text passage word limit
citation_excerpt: You may add a passage of up to five words as a Front-Cover Text, and a passage of up to 25 words as a Back-Cover Text, to the end of the list of Cover Texts in the Modified Version.

query: clang PowerPC mcrbits CR-bit tracking default condition
expected_answer: POWER8 and above, as well as for all other CPUs when optimization is applied (-O2 and above)
citation_excerpt: ``-mcrbits`` (the enablement of CR-bit tracking support) is the default for POWER8 and above, as well as for all other CPUs when optimization is applied (-O2 and above).

query: HTML5 embed element namespace-less attributes excluded from plugin parameters
citation_excerpt: Any namespace-less attribute other than name, align, hspace, and vspace may be specified on the embed element, so long as its name is XML-compatible and contains no uppercase ASCII letters.

query: HTTP/2 intermediary padding DATA vs HEADERS PUSH_PROMISE
expected_answer: Intermediaries SHOULD retain padding for DATA frames but MAY drop padding for HEADERS and PUSH_PROMISE frames
citation_excerpt: Intermediaries SHOULD retain padding for DATA frames but MAY drop padding for HEADERS and PUSH\_PROMISE frames.

query: WGSL atomicCompareExchangeWeak return type
citation_excerpt: atomicCompareExchangeWeak(atomic_ptr: ptr<SC, atomic<T, A, cmp: T, v: T) - vec2<T

query: ECMAScript default constructor function length property
citation_excerpt: The "length" property of a default constructor function is +0𝔽.

query: haproxy src_http_fail_cnt 5xx status codes excluded
citation_excerpt: This includes the both response errors and 5xx status codes other than 501 and 505.

query: haproxy resolvers nameserver TCP mode queries per connection
expected_answer: 4 queries are pipelined on the same connections
citation_excerpt: currently, in TCP mode, 4 queries are pipelined on the same connections. A batch of idle connections are removed every 5 seconds.

query: pandoc vimdoc-prefix which tags excluded from prefixing
expected_answer: ex-commands (those starting with `:`) don't get a prefix, since they are considered unique across help pages
citation_excerpt: vim.b and Span got their prefixes but not :Fnl because ex-commands (those starting with :) don't get a prefix, since they are considered unique across help pages.

query: lua string.pack format in In sn n valid range
citation_excerpt: For options "`!n`", "`sn`", "`in`", and "`In`", n can be any integer between 1 and 16.

query: LLVM llvm.sqrt negative number behavior vs libm
expected_answer: undefined behavior for negative numbers other than -0.0
citation_excerpt: Unlike sqrt in libm, however, llvm.sqrt has undefined behavior for negative numbers other than -0.0 (which allows for better optimization, because there is no need to worry about errno being set). llvm.sqrt(-0.0) is defined to return -0.0 like IEEE sqrt.

query: foreign exception non-unwind ABI boundary Rust behavior
citation_excerpt: A foreign exception entering Rust will cause undefined behavior.

query: CSS1 backslash unicode escape maximum hexadecimal digits
citation_excerpt: the backslash followed by at most four hexadecimal digits (0..9A..F) stands for the Unicode character with that number.

query: protobuf option retention Go language support version
citation_excerpt: Go has support starting from 1.29.0.

query: curl variable expand 64dec decode failure output string
citation_excerpt: If the sequence is not possible to decode, it instead outputs "[64dec-fail]"

query: texinfo Info file alternative extension MS-DOS Windows
citation_excerpt: On MS-DOS/MS-Windows systems, Info will try the .inf extension as well.

query: Hibernate Search MassIndexer MySQL JDBC idFetchSize value
citation_excerpt: MySQL's JDBC driver will load all values in memory. To avoid this "optimization" set idFetchSize to Integer.MIN_VALUE.

query: PAX archive dumpdir extended header variable name
citation_excerpt: In PAX archives, dumpdir is stored in the extended header of the corresponding directory, in variable `GNU.dumpdir`.

query: GraphQL error path aliased field name behavior
expected_answer: the path should use the aliased name, since it represents a path in the response, not in the request
citation_excerpt: If the error happens in an aliased field, the path to the error should use the aliased name, since it represents a path in the response, not in the request.

query: Spring Vault PcfAuthenticationOptions RSA-PSS signature library requirement
citation_excerpt: PcfAuthenticationOptions requires the BouncyCastle library for creating RSA-PSS signatures.

query: x3dom changePickMode valid intersect type values
citation_excerpt: Alter the value of intersct type. Can be one of: idbuf, color, textcoord, box. Other values are ignored.

query: glibc printf_info width precision star arginfo function value
citation_excerpt: But the structure passed to the arginfo function contains a value of INT_MIN, since the actual value is not known.

query: GNU find O_NOFOLLOW FreeBSD minimum version support
citation_excerpt: GNU/Linux (kernel version 2.1.126 and later) and FreeBSD (3.0-CURRENT and later) support this

query: ECMA-262 ForDeclaration BoundNames forbidden string syntax error
citation_excerpt: It is a Syntax Error if the BoundNames of ForDeclaration contains "let".

query: GFDL Front-Cover Text maximum word count
citation_excerpt: A Front-Cover Text may be at most 5 words, and a Back-Cover Text may be at most 25 words.

query: bazel action mnemonic metrics tracking limit count
expected_answer: 20 mnemonics with the largest number of executed actions
citation_excerpt: By default the number of action types is limited to the 20 mnemonics with the largest number of executed actions.

query: prometheus operator Route continue field first-level route override
expected_answer: always overridden to true for the first-level route
citation_excerpt: continue defines the boolean indicating whether an alert should continue matching subsequent sibling nodes. It will always be overridden to true for the first-level route by the Prometheus operator.

query: ECMAScript IsTypedArrayOutOfBounds zero-length ByteOffset equals bufferByteLength
citation_excerpt: A 0-length TypedArray whose [[ByteOffset]] is bufferByteLength is not considered out-of-bounds.

query: istio TracingServiceName APP_LABEL_AND_NAMESPACE missing app label fallback
citation_excerpt: If the`app` label does not exist`istio-proxy` is used.

query: WGSL atomic built-in functions prohibited shader stage
citation_excerpt: Atomic built-in functions must not be used in a vertex shader stage.

query: rust repr packed struct nested repr align member restriction
expected_answer: not permissible for a repr(packed) type to contain a repr(align(n)) type
citation_excerpt: It is also not permissible for a `repr(packed)` type to contain a `repr(align(n))` type.

query: RFC 9110 Content-MD5 HTTP field name registry status
citation_excerpt: IANA has updated the "Content-MD5" entry in the new registry to have a status of 'obsoleted' with references to [Section 14.15] of [RFC2616] (for the definition of the header field) and [Appendix B] of [RFC7231] (which removed the field definition from the updated specification).

query: Spring SimpleJdbcCall stored function metadata lookup supported databases
expected_answer: MySQL, Microsoft SQL Server, and Oracle
citation_excerpt: We also support metadata lookup of stored functions for: MySQL, Microsoft SQL Server, and Oracle.

query: Nx byte_size sub-byte s2 u2 u4 types behavior
expected_answer: the value will be rounded down
citation_excerpt: If the tensor has s2/s4/u2/u4 types, the value will be rounded down. Consider using bit_size/1 instead.

query: python dict.values() view equality comparison result
expected_answer: always return False, even when comparing dict.values() to itself
citation_excerpt: An equality comparison between one dict.values() view and another will always return False. This also applies when comparing dict.values() to itself

query: lodash capitalize effect non-first characters
citation_excerpt: Converts the first character of `string` to upper case and the remaining to lower case.

query: perl syscall maximum number arguments supported
citation_excerpt: Note that Perl supports passing of up to only 14 arguments to your syscall, which in practice should (usually) suffice.

query: RFC 5246 V2ClientHello challenge padding direction short
citation_excerpt: If the challenge length is less than 32, the TLS server will pad the data with leading (note: not trailing) zero bytes to make it 32 bytes long.

query: Spring Boot StatsD metrics export line protocol flavor default
citation_excerpt: You can also change the StatsD line protocol to use (it defaults to Datadog)

query: ffmpeg filter_complex bitmap subtitle stream no video fallback resolution
citation_excerpt: it will be converted into a video with the same size as the largest video in the file, or 720x576 if no video is present.

query: YAML block mapping implicit key maximum span restriction
citation_excerpt: such keys are subject to the same restrictions; they are limited to a single line and must not span more than 1024 Unicode characters.

query: mdbook backend plugin logging verbosity environment variable
citation_excerpt: All environment variables are passed through to the backend, allowing you to use the usual`MDBOOK_LOG` to control logging verbosity.

query: Spring Boot server.tomcat.processor-cache negative value behavior
expected_answer: the cache will be unlimited with a theoretical maximum size equal to the maximum number of connections
citation_excerpt: When set to -1 the cache will be unlimited with a theoretical maximum size equal to the maximum number of connections.

query: HTML5 embed element namespace-less attribute exceptions excluded
citation_excerpt: Any namespace-less attribute other than name, align, hspace, and vspace may be specified on the embed element, so long as its name is XML-compatible and contains no uppercase ASCII letters.

query: HTML ol type attribute zero negative number rendering
expected_answer: always use the decimal system regardless of the type attribute
citation_excerpt: Numbers less than or equal to zero should always use the decimal system regardless of the type attribute.

query: parse_datetime @ epoch timestamp excess precision truncation direction
citation_excerpt: The number can contain an internal decimal point (either '.' or ','); any excess precision not supported by the internal representation is truncated toward minus infinity.

query: RFC 9114 HTTP/3 SETTINGS values variable-length integer bit sizes
citation_excerpt: In HTTP/3, setting values are variable-length integers (6, 14, 30, or 62 bits long) rather than fixed-length 32-bit fields as in HTTP/2.

query: Apache TraceEnable extended chunked request body size limit
expected_answer: 64Kb (plus 8Kb for chunk headers if Transfer-Encoding: chunked is used)
citation_excerpt: The core (as an origin server) will restrict the request body to 64Kb (plus 8Kb for chunk headers if Transfer-Encoding: chunked is used).

query: clang-cl /Zp no value struct packing behavior
expected_answer: Set the default maximum struct packing alignment to 1
citation_excerpt: /Zp                     Set the default maximum struct packing alignment to 1

query: doxygen \image command inline option caption behavior HTML
citation_excerpt: In case the option inline is specified the image is placed "in the line", when a caption is present it is shown in HTML as tooltip (ignored for the other formats).

query: GNU coreutils chroot Cygwin privilege requirement
expected_answer: anyone can run the chroot command, because the underlying function is non-privileged due to lack of support in MS-Windows
citation_excerpt: Also, on Cygwin, anyone can run the chroot command, because the underlying function is non-privileged due to lack of support in MS-Windows.

query: go runtime GOMAXPROCS called with zero argument behavior
citation_excerpt: Calling it with zero just queries the value.

query: Kamal deploy minimum server RAM requirement
citation_excerpt: A server running Ubuntu LTS with 1GB RAM or more.

query: haproxy set-var ifgt iflt non-integer type check
expected_answer: the check is considered as true by default
citation_excerpt: This check can only be performed if both the input and the variable are of type integer. Otherwise, the check is considered as true by default.

query: curl upload-file stdin non-blocking mode filename
citation_excerpt: the file name "." (a single period) may be specified instead of "-" to use stdin in non-blocking mode to allow reading server output while stdin is being uploaded.

query: meson static_library install_tag default tag value
citation_excerpt: By default all build targets have the tag `runtime` except for static libraries that have the `devel` tag.

query: emacs calc rewrite apply pattern plus operator internal name
citation_excerpt: Formulas normally written with operators like `+` are still considered function calls: `apply(f,x)` matches 'a+b' with 'f = add', 'x = [a,b]'.

query: GraphQL response path list index numbering convention
citation_excerpt: path segments that represent list indices must be 0-indexed integers

query: haproxy cache served object server name log replacement
citation_excerpt: When an object is delivered from the cache, the server name in the log is replaced by " ".

query: texinfo-format-region missing closing brace error message
citation_excerpt: texinfo-format-region detects the missing closing brace but displays a message that says Unbalanced parentheses rather than Unbalanced braces. This is because the formatting command looks for mismatches between braces as if they were parentheses.

query: Hibernate Envers revision number overflow negative exception type
expected_answer: AuditException (causes current transaction to be rolled back)
citation_excerpt: In the event that the revision number reaches its upper bounds wrapping around becoming negative, an AuditException will be thrown causing the current transaction to be rolled back.

query: PointerEvents pressure attribute recommended precision limit
citation_excerpt: For pressure attributes, these should allow for a maximum of 256 distinct values

query: protobuf allow_alias enum all values distinct numbers behavior
citation_excerpt: So if an enum allows aliases but all of its values use distinct numbers, it is an error.

query: service worker FetchEvent replacesClientId engine implementation status
citation_excerpt: ⚠MDN [FetchEvent/replacesClientId] In no current engines. FirefoxNoneSafariNoneChromeNone

query: GNU diff expand-tabs encoding error column width treatment
citation_excerpt: When counting columns for options like --expand-tabs (-t), diff consults the locale for the column width of each character, and assumes that each encoding error occupies a single column.

query: Gradle Enterprise Build Scan captured links maximum character limit
citation_excerpt: Allow capturing links with up to 100000 characters

query: Quarkus reactive datasource shared pool default name
citation_excerpt: There can be multiple shared pools distinguished by name, when no specific name is set, the`__vertx.DEFAULT` name is used.

query: haproxy avg_queue no active server behavior
expected_answer: twice the number of queued connections is used as the measured value
citation_excerpt: Note that in the event there would not be any active server anymore, twice the number of queued connections would be considered as the measured value.

query: Roc reserved keywords where allowed as names
citation_excerpt: You can't choose any of them as names, except as record field names.

query: WCAG 2.1 relative luminance definition red threshold corrected value
citation_excerpt: In the definition for relative luminance, the red threshold was updated from 0.03928 to 0.04045.

query: find O_NOFOLLOW minimum Linux kernel version support
citation_excerpt: GNU/Linux (kernel version 2.1.126 and later) and FreeBSD (3.0-CURRENT and later) support this

query: jq |= update-assignment RHS produces no values
expected_answer: the left-hand side path will be deleted, as with del(path)
citation_excerpt: If the right-hand side outputs no values (i.e., `empty`), then the left-hand side path will be deleted, as with `del(path)`.

query: CSS scroll-snap-align computed value type
citation_excerpt: scroll-snap-align | [ none | start | end | center ]{1,2} | none | all elements | no | n/a | discrete | per grammar | two keywords

query: R parser #line directive placement constraint vs C
expected_answer: must appear as the first five characters on a line
citation_excerpt: Unlike the C directive, #line must appear as the first five characters on a line.

query: MEGA65 BASIC single-letter fast variables memory address range
citation_excerpt: Single-letter BASIC variables are "fast" variables stored in fixed memory addresses $FD00-$FEFF.

query: RFC 7230 quoted-pair backslash escape allowed control characters
citation_excerpt: The quoted-pair rule no longer allows escaping control characters other than HTAB.

query: Spring SockJS sessionCookieNeeded false IE 8 9 transport
citation_excerpt: If your application does not need it, you can turn off this option, and SockJS client should then choose`xdr-streaming` in IE 8 and 9.

query: aiohttp run_app default port ssl_context
citation_excerpt: Default is 8080 for plain text HTTP and 8443 for HTTP via SSL (when ssl_context parameter is specified).

query: click CliRunner isolation stderr error handling mode
citation_excerpt: Changed in version 8.0: `<stderr>` is opened with `errors="backslashreplace"` instead of the default `"strict"`.

query: emacs Mail mode special word separator character
citation_excerpt: Mail mode defines the character `%' as a word separator; this is helpful for using the word commands to edit mail addresses.

query: Quarkus smallrye-kafka channel attribute resolution fallback Map name
citation_excerpt: If the resolved Map does not contain the value the default Map is used (exposed with the `default-kafka-broker` name)

query: gcc SPU msmall-mem default address size assumption
citation_excerpt: By default, GCC generates code assuming that addresses are never larger than 18 bits.

query: bevy 3D ground plane local cursor coordinates which components Vec2
expected_answer: local_cursor.xz() (Y coordinate discarded because it's always zero on the plane)
citation_excerpt: we can discard the Y coordinate, because it should always be zero (our point is supposed to be on the plane) mycoords.local = local_cursor.xz();

query: Kotlin curly braces code block statement position interpretation
citation_excerpt: Kotlin does not support code blocks as statements; a curly-braces code block in a statement position is a lambda literal.

query: Odin #load typed file size not multiple of type
citation_excerpt: If a file's size is not a multiple of the `size_of(type)`, then any remainder is ignored.

query: clang mlong-double-80 storage padding size
citation_excerpt: Force long double to be 80 bits, padded to 128 bits for storage

query: org clocktable :step untilnow range starting point
citation_excerpt: When using `:step`, `untilnow` starts from the beginning of 2003, not the beginning of time.

query: Bluespec BSV core tool Haskell codebase size
citation_excerpt: The core tool is implemented in Haskell (well over 100K lines).

query: ffmpeg ffmetadata chapter missing timebase assumed units
citation_excerpt: If the timebase is missing then start/end times are assumed to be in nanoseconds.

query: fish shell IFS empty string effect command substitution
expected_answer: disables line splitting in command substitution
citation_excerpt: Setting this to the empty string will also disable line splitting in command substitution.

query: Rust StreamExt next method where clause constraint
Lua file:read "n" numeral format maximum input length
citation_excerpt: if that prefix does not form a valid numeral (e.g., an empty string, "0x", or "3.4e-") or it is too long (more than 200 characters), it is discarded and the format returns fail.

query: CSSRule KEYFRAMES_RULE constant value css-animations
citation_excerpt: const unsigned short `KEYFRAMES_RULE` = 7;

query: RFC 1035 resolver SLIST address no history round trip time
citation_excerpt: in this case an expected round trip time of 5-10 seconds should be the worst case, with lower estimates for the same local network, etc.

query: RFC 6749 OAuth scope parameter usage location registry
expected_answer: authorization request, authorization response, token request, token response
citation_excerpt:
Parameter name: scope
   Parameter usage location: authorization request, authorization
      response, token request, token response

query: valgrind cachegrind fsave large FPU instruction simulated access size
citation_excerpt: FPU instructions with data sizes of 28 and 108 bytes (e.g. fsave) are treated as though they only access 16 bytes.

query: CockroachDB opt_join_hint valid hint keywords
citation_excerpt: HASHMERGELOOKUPINVERTEDSTRAIGHT

query: tmux range=user argument maximum length limit
citation_excerpt: ‘`X`’ must be at most 15 bytes in length.

query: os.spawnve invalid env keys values return value
citation_excerpt: invalid keys or values will cause the function to fail, with a return value of 127

query: LLVM masked.scatter overlapping addresses ordering
expected_answer: ordered from least-significant to most-significant element
citation_excerpt: Scatter with overlapping addresses is guaranteed to be ordered from least-significant to most-significant element.

query: ECMAScript template TRV bare CR LineTerminatorSequence result
citation_excerpt: The TRV of LineTerminatorSequence::<CR> is the String value consisting of the code unit 0x000A (LINE FEED).

query: GraphQL response extensions entry value type requirement
citation_excerpt: This entry, if set, must have a map as its value.

query: bazel cc_binary malloc attribute when linkshared specified
expected_answer: The value of the malloc attribute is ignored if linkshared=True is specified.
citation_excerpt: The value of this attribute is ignored if`linkshared=True`is specified.

query: Ecto with_ties limit redefined interaction requirement
citation_excerpt: If `limit` is redefined then `with_ties` must be reapplied.

query: JUnit Platform EngineDescriptor default TestDescriptor.Type
citation_excerpt: The ENGINE enum constant was removed from TestDescriptor.Type. The default type of the EngineDescriptor is now TestDescriptor.Type.CONTAINER.

query: automake parallel make recovery locking portable test-and-set command
citation_excerpt:
## mkdir is a portable test-and-set
if mkdir data.lock 2>>/dev/null; then

query: wasm-bindgen webdriver.json headless argument override behavior
citation_excerpt: Note that the `headless` argument is always enabled for both browsers.

query: Spring Boot FilterRegistrationBean default dispatcherType
citation_excerpt: If no `dispatcherType` is specified on a filter registration, `REQUEST` is used. This aligns with the servlet specification's default dispatcher type.

query: micronaut views CSP nonce server-side request attribute name
citation_excerpt: The nonce value can be accessed on the server as a request attribute named`cspNonce`.

query: python socket sendfile socket type requirement
citation_excerpt: The socket must be of SOCK_STREAM type. Non-blocking sockets are not supported.

query: git reachability bitmaps maximum bitmap files per repository
expected_answer: at most one bitmap file in use
citation_excerpt: A repository may have at most one bitmap file in use. The bitmap file may belong to either one pack, or the repository's multi-pack index (if it exists).

query: dockerfile HEALTHCHECK command output stored size limit
citation_excerpt: Such output should be kept short (only the first 4096 bytes are stored currently).

query: haproxy avg_queue behavior no active server
expected_answer: twice the number of queued connections
citation_excerpt: Note that in the event there would not be any active server anymore, twice the number of queued connections would be considered as the measured value.

query: bash history expansion q x modifiers combined behavior
expected_answer: mutually exclusive; expansion uses the last one supplied
citation_excerpt: The 'q' and 'x' modifiers are mutually exclusive; expansion uses the last one supplied.

query: helmfile hook Event.Error which events available
citation_excerpt: .Event.Error is the error generated by a failed release, exposed for postsync hooks only when a release fails, otherwise its value is nil.

query: rust asm! explicit register operands position operand list
expected_answer: must appear at the end of the operand list after all other operand types
citation_excerpt: unlike other operand types, explicit register operands cannot be used in the template string: you can't use `{}` and should write the register name directly instead. Also, they must appear at the end of the operand list after all other operand types.

query: duckdb_appender_create_query valid SQL statement types
expected_answer: INSERT, DELETE, UPDATE or MERGE INTO
citation_excerpt: The query to execute, can be an INSERT, DELETE, UPDATE or MERGE INTO statement.

query: pulumi fully_qualified_stack_name diy backend org requirement
citation_excerpt: Non-legacy diy backends do support the org/project/stack format but org must be set to "organization".

query: ClickHouse regexp_tree dictionary back reference max number
citation_excerpt: Back-reference numbers range from 1 to 9 and are written as `$1` or `\1` (for number 1).

query: ssl SSLObject suppress_ragged_eofs EOF behavior
expected_answer: All end-of-file conditions that are in violation of the protocol are reported via the SSLEOFError exception
citation_excerpt: There is no handling of suppress_ragged_eofs. All end-of-file conditions that are in violation of the protocol are reported via the SSLEOFError exception.

query: CSS quirky lengths functional notation calc exception
citation_excerpt: It is not valid in properties that include or reference these properties, such as the background shorthand, or inside functional notations such as calc(), except that they must be allowed in rect() in the clip property.

query: envoy gateway TriggerEnum retriable-4xx which response codes
citation_excerpt: The upstream server responds with a retriable 4xx response code. Currently, the only response code in this category is 409.

query: ripgrep NUL bytes handling without text flag
citation_excerpt: When the -a/--text flag isn't enabled, ripgrep will replace all NUL bytes with line terminators, which typically prevents exorbitant memory usage.

query: go net/http Transport Idempotency-Key zero-length slice behavior
expected_answer: the request is treated as idempotent but the header is not sent on the wire
citation_excerpt: If the idempotency key value is a zero-length slice, the request is treated as idempotent but the header is not sent on the wire.

query: GNU Mach ddb macro nesting maximum depth
citation_excerpt: The nesting of macro can be allowed up to 5 levels.

query: grafana-operator route tls passthrough termination restriction
citation_excerpt: Note: passthrough termination is incompatible with httpHeader actions

query: WebRTC remote MediaStreamTrack applyConstraints rejection error
citation_excerpt: MediaStreamTrack.applyConstraints() MUST always reject with OverconstrainedError on remote tracks for constraints defined here.

query: kubernetes CSIDriverSpec storageCapacity field immutability version
expected_answer: immutable in Kubernetes <= 1.22 and now is mutable
citation_excerpt: This field was immutable in Kubernetes <= 1.22 and now is mutable.

query: Go runtime MemStats GCCPUFraction excluded CPU activity
citation_excerpt: GCCPUFraction does not include CPU time used for write barrier activity.

query: Haskell Ord Double compare NaN result value
citation_excerpt: both compare NaN x and compare x NaN always return GT

query: GLSL image atomic operations float data type which function
citation_excerpt: a float image variable (type starts "image") and a format qualifier of r32f, used with a data argument of type float (imageAtomicExchange only).

query: esbuild CLI transform API sourcemap supported modes
citation_excerpt: the CLI form of the transform API only supports the `inline` mode because the output is written to stdout so generating multiple output files is not possible.

query: njs zlib windowBits valid range raw data
citation_excerpt: windowBits — is an integer from -15 to -9 for raw data, from 9 to 15 for an ordinary stream

query: emacs table-generate-source valid language options
expected_answer: html, latex, cals, wiki, or mediawiki
citation_excerpt: It asks for a language (which must be one of html, latex, cals, wiki or mediawiki), a destination buffer in which to put the result, and a table caption

query: bash mapfile readarray -C callback without -c default quantum
citation_excerpt: If -C is specified without -c, the default quantum is 5000.

query: TLS 1.3 ServerHello extensions field minimum length bytes
citation_excerpt: Extension extensions<6..2^16-1>;

query: CSS grid align-content justify-content stretch which tracks accept space
expected_answer: only tracks with an auto max track sizing function
citation_excerpt: When introducing space within tracks, only tracks with an auto max track sizing function accept space.

query: Prisma atomic increment decrement null field behavior
expected_answer: If a field is null, it will not be updated by increment, decrement, multiply, or divide.
citation_excerpt: If a field is`null`, it will not be updated by`increment`,`decrement`,`multiply`, or`divide`.

query: elasticsearch snapshot.get ignore_unavailable exception type thrown
citation_excerpt: Whether to ignore unavailable snapshots, defaults to false which means a SnapshotMissingException is thrown

query: CSS display contents pseudo-elements box not generated
citation_excerpt: Clarified that an element's ::before and ::after pseudo-elements still exist if its own box is not generated due to display: contents.

query: gettext LC_MESSAGES mingw arbitrary value substitute
citation_excerpt: Some system, e.g. mingw, don't have LC_MESSAGES. Here we use a more or less arbitrary value for it, namely 1729, the smallest positive integer which can be represented in two different ways as the sum of two cubes.

query: haproxy maximum chunked encoding chunk size limit
citation_excerpt: Haproxy supports chunk sizes of up to 2GB - 1 (2147483647 bytes). Any larger size will be considered as an error.

query: termcap pO printer redirect maximum n limit
citation_excerpt: The number n should not be more than 255.

query: rustdoc doc auto_cfg hide default hidden cfg attributes
citation_excerpt: Rustdoc currently hides `doc` and `doctest` attributes by default and reserves the right to change the list of "hidden by default" attributes.

query: CSSFontFeatureValuesMap set method exception too many values
citation_excerpt: the set method throws an InvalidAccessError exception when the input sequence to set contains more than the limited number of values

query: ns3 NS_TEST_EXPECT vs NS_TEST_ASSERT when to use
expected_answer: EXPECT variants are designed specially for use in methods (especially callbacks) returning void
citation_excerpt: Finally, there are variants of the above where the keyword ASSERT is replaced by EXPECT. These variants are designed specially for use in methods (especially callbacks) returning void.

query: GNU make $(@D) automatic variable target contains no slash
citation_excerpt: This value is . if '$@' does not contain a slash.

citation_excerpt: If `slice` is `nil`, the result is `nil`. Otherwise it is a non-`nil` pointer to an unspecified memory address

query: Hibernate Envers @NotFound IGNORE side effect to-one
expected_answer: implicit eager loading of to-one relations
citation_excerpt: The hereby solution causes implicit eager loading of to-one relations.

query: node.js cluster isMaster how determined condition
citation_excerpt: A process `isMaster` if `process.env.NODE_WORKER_ID` is undefined.

query: Vert.x CSRFHandler session aware token regeneration condition
expected_answer: tokens will only be regenerated on session upgrades
citation_excerpt: This also implies that tokens will only be regenerated on session upgrades.

query: SVG2 CORS state style property presentation attribute URL fetch
citation_excerpt: For a reference from a style property or presentation attribute, the "anonymous" state.

query: gnu units !var environment variable not set behavior
expected_answer: prints an error message and ignores the block of definitions
citation_excerpt: If envar is not set, units prints an error message and ignores the block of definitions.

query: nixpkgs GHC core library profiling override parameter name
citation_excerpt:
Unfortunately, the GHC setting is named differently for historical reasons
            enableProfiledLibs = enableProfiling;

query: ffmpeg scale filter both width height -n edge case
expected_answer: identical to both values being set to 0
citation_excerpt: If both values are -n with n >= 1, the behavior will be identical to both values being set to 0 as previously detailed.

query: CSS flexbox main size depends on cross size auto indefinite substitute
citation_excerpt: If a cross size is needed to determine the main size (e.g. when the flex item's main size is in its block axis) and the flex item's cross size is auto and not definite, in this calculation use fit-content as the flex item's cross size.

query: CSS text-3 Chinese writing system assumed ISO script codes
expected_answer: Hant, Hans, Hani, Hanb, or Bopo
citation_excerpt: for any content language if the writing system to specified to be one of the Hant, Hans, Hani, Hanb, or Bopo ISO script codes, then the writing system is Chinese.

query: emacs max-lisp-eval-depth suggested increase factor
citation_excerpt: You may want to increase the value of `max-lisp-eval-depth`. In my `.emacs` file, I set it to 30 times its default value.

query: libtool _cmds _eval variable command list separator
citation_excerpt: Variables ending in '_cmds' or '_eval' contain a '~'-separated list of commands that are eval ed one after another.
